text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest, where students
participate in various events to entertain their
fans.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: We're the Getaway Sisters! BRING IT ON!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Our dynamic duo is going to triumph in this Front
Runner vs. End Closer Tag Battle!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, ah, of course...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! We shall fight vigorously, too. Isn't that
right, C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Mhm. Let's enjoy this match to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ines! Suzuka! Kick 'em to the curb!
C'mon, C.B. and Bright! You two can't lose!
choice_data_list: The crowd is really fired up!
The crowd is really fired up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The seats are packed with fans here to witness
this game of tag between front runners and end
closers, and Ines Fujin is among the competitors.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Bright! Your adductor muscles have gotten a lot
stronger! Focus on making sharp cuts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We have to get moving, Ryan. Our talk show will
be starting any minute!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're right! I lost track of time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Are you nervous about Bright's big moment
in the spotlight?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Weeell...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Less nervous and more excited, I'd say!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's always diligently followed in our footsteps. I
know she's got what it takes to get the job done!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You know, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've become markedly resolute. Completely
different to how you were before your debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In one of your post-race interviews, you claimed
you weren't a runner the Mejiro family could be
proud of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, it's clear that you now have the
strength to bear the burden of our family name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Never thought the day would come when
I'd get praise like that from you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I think that's all thanks to being in an
environment where I can constantly improve
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Being here lets me focus on winning. All the
muscles I built up to achieve my goals just came
naturally along the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I don't believe that's all it is. You also
developed the determination necessary to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And I, too, have my pride to uphold. I shall claim
the shield of the spring Tenno Sho and offer it to
our family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know your goal, but there's no way I'll lose to
you! Anyway, we better get going already!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Front Runner vs. End Closer Tag Battle is now
underway! And it seems our closers have already
set their sights on their targets!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! C.B. is coming right for me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown champion is hot on Ines Fujin's
heels! What fearsome speed! Can our front runner
make her escape?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, C.B. is fierce out there!
Show everyone what you've got, Ines! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I really hope this doesn't shake
Ines's confidence!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Such a powerful presence bearing down on her...
It'd be super sad if she gave up being a front
runner because of that! Will she be okay?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't think we need to worry about that.
Take a look at her face.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
How will she get out of this bind?! Mr. C.B.
extends her arm towards Ines Fujin's back!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I've been caught!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! This sucks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin slumps to the ground in complete
exhaustion, but her voice doesn't waver in the
slightest.
choice_data_list: You'll definitely get away next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep trying no matter how many times it takes!
I won't give up as long as I still have a chance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her powerful declaration earns a round of
applause from the spectators.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't think we need to worry about that.
Take a look at her face.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
How will she get out of this bind?! Mr. C.B.
extends her arm towards Ines Fujin's back!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Crap, I need more speed! I have to move my legs
even faster!)

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now I've got y—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (Wait, maybe I could... Well, it's now or never.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Ines Fujin suddenly drops her speed,
leaving Mr. C.B to grasp at thin air!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Aha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now she swiftly changes direction, masterfully
outmaneuvering the Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Catch me if you can! ♪ I'm right here!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oho, you're quite a clever one!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd roars as the intense back-and-forth
between the two heats up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm completely exhausted... But I gave it
everything I had!
choice_data_list: That was a brilliant strategy you used!
That was a brilliant strategy you used!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I know, right? I just tried suppressing my
urge to charge ahead. Taking my foot off the gas
like that sure wasn't easy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I tried applying what I learned last summer!
Thanks to that, my stamina held out a little
longer than usual!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No idea if I'd be able to pull off that kind of
running in an actual race, though...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know I can put everything I learn to good use
somehow, so keep teaching me all kinds of stuff,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin appears very content with her progress,
and we exchange a high five amidst the
boisterous applause.
